title: Major Spon End house building gets underway
summary: Construction has started to build new affordable homes in the first phase part of a  regeneration scheme in Spon End.

title: Helping victims of Anti-Social Behaviour
summary: Coventry City Council is strengthening its work to support repeat victims of anti-social behaviour (ASB).

title: Over £60,000 awarded to support community arts projects across Coventry
summary: Fifteen creative projects across Coventry have been awarded funding through the Council’s new Made in Cov Arts & Creative Grants programme.

title: Coventry celebrates with a night of live music at Coventry Music’s Summer Showcase!
summary: Hundreds of people gathered on Tuesday 30 June to enjoy an evening of live performances from young and talented musicians from across Coventry at Warwick Arts Centre.

title: Public encouraged to feedback on city centre safety proposal
summary: Coventry City Council is asking for people’s views on whether a City Centre Public Spaces Protection Order (PSPO) should continue for another three years, until November 2029.

title: Trusty steeds help promote anti-social behaviour awareness
summary: The Council has been linking with Coventry Police this week to highlight the work they are doing to tackle anti-social behaviour in the city centre including action on the dangerous use of e-bikes.
